series_metadata.series_title: Application for Certificate of Plan Approval and Occupancy
series_metadata.series_description: Application file consists of plans, specifications, correspondence, and associated documents.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: record shall be retained one year a Certificate of Occupancy is issued; one year expiration/invalidation of plan approval or application, including any renewal/extension periods; or one year all appeals or hearing opportunities have expired following an adjudication order denying plan approval. ; Paper: If paper copy is imaged and indexed into a machine readable format retention
